message:
fix: log transient tmux errors in DetectZombiePolecats instead of silently skipping (gt-4len6)

When HasSession returned a transient tmux IPC error, the code treated
the polecat as non-zombie and skipped it entirely. Now transient errors
are collected in result.Errors so the caller knows detection was
incomplete, rather than silently missing zombies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
